'''Tahlboor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Thanium sector/Legends|Thanium sector]]. It was home to the [[Tahlboorean]]s, who were divided into two castes: the [[Troob]]s and the [[Hobor]]s, perpetually at war. In the past, an ancient Tahlboorean civilization had constructed the [[Sky cannon]], an awesome weapon that had resulted in the destruction of both their civilization and one of the world's twin [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
